data.title: From Automation to Autonomy: SUPCON to showcase next-generation technologies empowering Autonomous Operating Plants at Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: On April 13, 2026, in Singapore, SUPCON (688777.SH, SUPCON.SW) announced its leadership in industrial automation and industrial artificial intelligence. The company will exhibit at Hannover Messe 2026 from April 20 to 24, presenting the latest in smart industry technologies.

data.title: New Zcash mining pool by Foundry sees 29% hashrate in debut month, reducing ViaBTC's dominance to 37% from 65%.
data.description: The introduction of Foundry Zcash Pool has significantly reduced ViaBTC's mining pool dominance in hashrate from approximately 65% to 37%. This marks a substantial shift in the mining landscape as Foundry Zcash Pool gains traction within the industry. The move has diversified the overall distribution of mining power, with ViaBTC's influence decreasing notably. This change highlights the growing competition in the mining sector and the impact of new entrants on established players.

data.title: BangQi Technology Debuts at MODEX 2026 with New Smart Logistics Solution for Overseas Warehouses
data.description: Between April 13 and 16, 2026, BangQi Technology, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven smart factories and unmanned warehouses, will be present at MODEX 2026, a leading international trade show focusing on material handling, logistics technology, and supply chain advancement. This event in Atlanta features participation from various industry giants and serves as a platform for showcasing the latest innovations and solutions in the sector.

data.title: Faraday Future to Participate in and Host Upcoming New York Investor and Industry Events, Highlighting Its Broader Vision for EAI Mobility and Robotics
data.description: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a leading California-based global intelligent electric mobility company, revealed that its Global President, Jerry Wang, is set to engage in multiple investor and industry events in New York this April. Alongside this, Faraday Future will be exhibiting its state-of-the-art electric vehicles and advanced robotics technologies at these events. Participants will be able to firsthand experience the innovative offerings presented by the company.
